prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: LUCA-AI Sompo field-risk simulation evidence image. Primary request: realistic field inspection of a soybean farm in Rio Grande do Sul, Brazil, under drought and water restriction, insurance risk prevention context. Scene/backdrop: rural soybean field with mixed green and stressed yellow plants, dry cracked soil patches, horizon of low farms and service road. Subject: agronomist field inspector in neutral work clothes using tablet and GPS marker, no visible brand logos. Style/medium: photorealistic documentary photo, natural light, high detail. Composition/framing: landscape 3:2, inspector at right third, stressed soybean rows leading into the image, usable dark negative space at top for dashboard crop. Lighting/mood: late afternoon, serious technical audit mood. Constraints: no text, no watermark, no Sompo logo, no fake documents, no distorted hands.

Use case: productivity-visual. Asset type: LUCA-AI Sompo field-risk simulation evidence image. Primary request: close-up operational evidence kit for agricultural insurance drought triage. Scene/backdrop: pickup tailgate or portable field table beside soybean rows in Rio Grande do Sul. Subject: tablet showing a generic map grid without readable brand names, paper field checklist with abstract unreadable marks, soil sample bag, rain gauge, measuring tape, phone with GPS pin interface, dry soybean leaf sample. Style/medium: photorealistic operational still life, sharp documentary detail. Composition/framing: landscape 3:2, top-down 45 degree angle, all objects organized for audit. Lighting/mood: practical fieldwork daylight, precise and technical. Constraints: no readable company names, no logos, no watermarks, no legible personal data.

Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: LUCA-AI Sompo simulation dashboard visual. Primary request: dark technical operations dashboard for field risk prevention in agricultural insurance, showing a realistic case monitor for soybean drought triage. Scene/backdrop: laptop or workstation screen in a dim operations room. Subject: dashboard with map-like grid, severity queue, evidence completeness bars, inspection priority list, and agent workflow nodes, but all text must be abstract blocks or tiny unreadable labels. Style/medium: photorealistic screen photo with high-quality UI mockup, dark panel aesthetic, green and amber status accents. Composition/framing: landscape 3:2, screen centered, slight perspective, no human faces. Lighting/mood: focused command center. Constraints: no readable Sompo logo, no real client names, no watermark, no fake official document.

Use case: infographic-diagram. Asset type: LUCA-AI Sompo simulation process visual. Primary request: professional visual workflow diagram for agents processing an agricultural insurance field-risk case. Scene/backdrop: clean dark technical board. Subject: six connected stages represented by icons and abstract blocks: source verification, policy and parcel mapping, climate signal, evidence intake, severity scoring, preventive action. Style/medium: polished business infographic rendered as raster image, not flat SVG, dark background, restrained green, amber, and red status cues. Composition/framing: landscape 3:2, left-to-right flow, clean spacing. Lighting/mood: precise operational planning. Text: no readable text except short generic numbers 01 to 06. Constraints: no logos, no watermark, no brand names.

Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: LUCA-AI Sompo field-risk simulation operational image. Primary request: realistic preventive call between agricultural insurance operations and rural producer after drought signal. Scene/backdrop: split field-office context in one natural photo: agronomist near pickup in soybean field holding phone and tablet, in background a rural producer and broker review a generic map printout on truck hood. Subject: calm technical discussion, no visible brand marks. Style/medium: photorealistic documentary, Brazilian rural environment, high detail. Composition/framing: landscape 3:2, people small enough to avoid identity focus, documents unreadable. Lighting/mood: practical, urgent but controlled. Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no identifiable personal data.

Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: LUCA-AI Sompo simulation aerial evidence image. Primary request: drone-style overview of soybean parcels in Rio Grande do Sul with uneven drought stress patterns for insurance prevention triage. Scene/backdrop: agricultural parcels, service roads, patches of healthy and stressed soybean vegetation, subtle dry creek line. Subject: clear parcel boundaries and visible variation that would trigger remote triage. Style/medium: photorealistic aerial drone image, high detail, natural colors. Composition/framing: landscape 3:2, top-down oblique, no UI overlays. Lighting/mood: midday survey, technical evidence. Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no unrealistic disaster damage.
